name: Markdown Notes Publisher
tagline: Saves, browses, uploads, previews, and semantically searches BFrost Markdown notes.
description:
A consumer worker that turns selected Item Bus entries into local Markdown notes. It can save `news.article`, `research.paper`, `web.page`, `webhook.event`, or any configured item type into a folder chosen by the operator.

The worker is built for low-code use: choose a folder, select suggested item types, run a producer, then approve generated file-write actions. The dashboard can browse the notes folder, preview files as formatted Markdown or raw text, upload manual notes, index existing files, and search notes semantically with BFrost's selected embedding model.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Adds selectable Item Bus type suggestions, a notes-folder dashboard with formatted/raw previews and manual uploads, and semantic indexing/search using BFrost's selected embedding model.
Initial source-backed release with folder settings, note templates, approval-backed file writes, dashboard view, and low-code README.
